acceptance_description: A raw mmCIF file must be available before evidence cross-check.
The raw mmCIF must contain struct_conn records.
One struct_conn partner must be CYS SG.
The ligand partner component ID must match the expected HET code.
Chain and residue index must match or require explicit reviewable mapping.
Disulfide or SG-SG-only evidence cannot satisfy ligand covalent evidence.
The ligand atom name must come from struct_conn evidence.
PDB ID alone is not event identity.
Ligand ID alone is not event identity.
Cross-check evidence still requires review before ready status.
Feature semantics audit remains required before training.
This plan cannot be used as training input.
